result:
All 484 assertions pass. Summary of fixes applied:

**From repair queue (6 high-confidence specfix-oracle hits):**
- `catalog.rkt:27` ‚Äî `product-margin` operands swapped (price - cost, not cost - price)
- `shipping.rkt:44` ‚Äî `carrier-total-cost` used `carrier-id` instead of `carrier-base-rate`
- `shipping.rkt:68` ‚Äî `zone-surcharge` used `+` instead of `*` for percentage calc
- `shipping.rkt:210` ‚Äî `shipping-cost-for-order` passed `"pending"` instead of `order-id`
- `customers.rkt:30-32` ‚Äî `tier-discount-pct` had gold/bronze values swapped
- `inventory.rkt:112` ‚Äî `reorder-needed` comparator flipped (should be `<`, not `>`)

**Beyond the queue (found by tracing remaining failures):**
- `billing.rkt:41` ‚Äî `(cust/customer-id)` called with no args; needed `customer`
- `billing.rkt:49` ‚Äî `invoices-for-customer` used `invoice-order-id` instead of `invoice-customer-id`
- `billing.rkt:72` ‚Äî `mark-invoice-paid` passed `invoice-status` instead of `invoice-due-at`
- `orders.rkt:43` ‚Äî `calculate-tax` had spurious `* 2` doubling the tax
- `orders.rkt:49` ‚Äî `calculate-total` added discount instead of subtracting
- `orders.rkt:55` ‚Äî `customer-discount-pct` passed `customer-id` (scalar) instead of `customer-tier` (string)
- `procurement.rkt:33` ‚Äî `poline-total` used `+` instead of `*` for qty √ó unit-cost
- `promotions.rkt:43` ‚Äî `campaign-active?` compared `campaign-id` instead of `campaign-start-date`
- `promotions.rkt:117` ‚Äî coupon percentage divisor was 10, should be 100
- `promotions.rkt:164` ‚Äî `customer-eligible?` passed `customer-id` instead of `customer-tier`
- `employees.rkt:27` ‚Äî `find-employee-by-id` used `employee-hire-date` instead of `employee-id`
- `employees.rkt:65` ‚Äî `line-commission` used `+ rate amount` instead of `* rate amount`
- `employees.rkt:81` ‚Äî `total-commission` passed `(employee-name o)` to itself instead of `employee-id`
- `analytics.rkt:121` ‚Äî `revenue-by-period` missing `orders` arg to `orders-in-period`
- `notifications.rkt:51-57` ‚Äî `create-notification` missing `reference-id` arg and used wrong `Timestamp` constructor
- `audit.rkt:48` ‚Äî `audit-order` used `order-customer-id` instead of `order-id`
- `audit.rkt:55` ‚Äî `audit-shipment` used `shipment-status` for entity-id instead of `shipment-id`
- `audit.rkt:98` ‚Äî `entries-in-period` had `>=` for the upper bound (should be `<=`)

Final: **484 passed, 0 failed.**
